# AI Image Prompt Atlas Full Summary

This repository contains 80 structured prompt recipes across 10 categories.

Categories:
- Product Photography: Commercial product images with controlled lighting, materials, and layout.
- Readable Text Posters: Poster and cover prompts that prioritize legible typography and clean layout.
- UI Mockups: App and dashboard visuals with readable interface hierarchy.
- Reference Image Editing: Editing prompts that preserve subject identity while changing context or style.
- Ecommerce Mockups: Market-ready product, packaging, and listing visuals.
- Social Covers: Thumbnails, blog covers, carousels, and social posts.
- Brand Visuals: Brand marks, campaign art direction, and visual identity exploration.
- Infographics: Structured visuals that explain workflows, comparisons, and concepts.
- Character Design: Consistent character sheets, poses, outfits, and stylized concepts.
- Style Transfer: Prompts for controlled visual style changes without losing core structure.

Prompt recipe fields:
- title
- category
- use case
- input type
- output type
- difficulty
- aspect ratio
- prompt
- negative prompt
- why it works
- variations
- editorial scores
- image path
- GPTImg2 links

Representative examples:
- Minimal Wireless Charger: premium ecommerce hero image
- Glass Skincare Bottle: beauty product listing image
- Ceramic Coffee Mug: lifestyle product hero image
- Running Shoe Detail: sport ecommerce detail shot
- Desk Lamp Launch: landing page product render
- Reusable Water Bottle: marketplace catalog image
- Smartwatch Strap Set: accessory comparison image
- Artisan Chocolate Box: premium food product photo
- Launch Poster: startup announcement visual
- Workshop Flyer: event promotion poster
- Quote Card: social media quote graphic
- Sale Banner: campaign banner
- Music Poster: music event poster
- App Update Card: SaaS release image
- Coffee Menu: restaurant menu visual
- Book Cover: publishing concept
- Analytics Dashboard: SaaS hero mockup
- Mobile Finance App: app store preview
- AI Editor Interface: product screenshot concept
- Travel Planner: mobile UI concept
